title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG uploads.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; offers synchronous & async APIs, model management, and streaming chat.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + ChromaDB + LangChain to chat with local PDFs/documents.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Lightweight React chatbot component that plugs into any Ollama instance via REST API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as inline Copilot suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & autoscaling support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that wraps Ollama REST APIs with extra sugar like prompt templates & output streaming.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Tauri (Rust) + React; no browser needed.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets server members chat with local Ollama models through slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration using Ray Serve to load-balance multiple Ollama workers behind one app.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app template exposing Ollama chat & embeddings via REST with Swagger docs and JWT auth.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit component that turns any Ollama model into an interactive chat playground in minutes.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official NPM package for Ollama; same API as ollama-js repo but distributed via npm registry.

title: ollama-py
summary: Official PyPI package for Ollama; identical to ollama-python repo, installable via pip.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-built Rust crate providing strongly-typed bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-models
summary: Curated collection of Modelfiles for community-tuned LLMs ready to pull into any Ollama instance.
